scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach((f)=>{try{fs.unlinkSync(f)}catch{}}); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.check:node: node -e "const v=process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number); const ok=(v[0] > 20) || (v[0]===20 && v[1] >= 19) || (v[0] >= 22); if(!ok){console.error('Node.js 20.19+ or 22+ is required. Current: '+process.versions.node); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck
scripts.deploy:check: pnpm run check:node && pnpm run build
